nodes.name: Purple-backed fairywren
nodes.summary: Purple-backed fairywren（Purple-backed fairywren，学名 Malurus assimilis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于Alfred John North，常见栖息地包括灌丛。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Alfred John North
nodes.summary: Alfred John North (11 June 1855 – 6 May 1917) was an Australian ornithologist.

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The purple-backed fairywren (Malurus assimilis) is a fairywren that is native to Australia

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Distributed over much of the Australian continent, the purple-backed fairywren is found in scrubland with plenty of vegetation providing dense cover
